backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for the Coal & Curry backend that manages reservations, newsletter subscribers, and reviews using Map/Set storage with CRUD query/update methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (per-page SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter Card tags) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's page and component structure.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with a root div and a module script tag loading main.tsx, serving as the SPA entry point for the React application.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers on all paths except /cart and /checkout, with a reference to the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all 9 public routes of coalandcurry.com with canonical URLs, last-modified dates, change frequencies, and priority values.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in LanguageProvider and CartProvider, and renders the shared Layout (Navbar, Footer, FloatingReserveButton, ChatbotWidget).
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotP: Chatbot UI panel component that renders a scrollable message thread, typing indicator, quick-reply buttons, and a text input form, using getBotResponse to generate bot replies with a simulated delay.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotW: Floating chatbot toggle button that shows or hides the ChatbotPanel, fixed to the bottom-right corner of the screen.
frontend/src/components/gallery/Lightbox: A fullscreen image lightbox modal component with keyboard navigation (Escape, arrow keys) and prev/next buttons, displaying the current image with caption and index counter.
frontend/src/components/home/CustomerRev: A carousel-style customer reviews section that fetches top reviews from the backend (with fallback static data), displaying three reviews at a time with star ratings and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: The full-screen hero section with a charcoal grill background image, restaurant tagline, headline, and CTA buttons linking to the menu, reservation, and checkout pages.
frontend/src/components/home/InstagramFe: A static Instagram feed grid section displaying six food/gallery images as links to the restaurant's Instagram profile with hover overlay effects.
frontend/src/components/home/OffersGalle: A promotional section displaying three hardcoded limited-time offers (Lunch Combo, Family Feast, Weekend Grill Fest) over a background image with a link to the full offers page.
frontend/src/components/home/SignatureDi: A grid section showcasing four hardcoded signature dishes with images, badges, descriptions, prices, and add-to-cart buttons, linking to the full menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingR: A fixed floating action button in the bottom-right corner that links to the reservation page with a pulsing gold style.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A multi-column site footer containing the brand logo, social links, quick navigation links, menu category links, and contact information, with an embedded newsletter signup component.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Responsive navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, mobile hamburger menu, cart item badge, language toggle, and links to all main routes.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Newsletter subscription form component that calls a backend mutation and displays success, duplicate, or error feedback states.
frontend/src/components/menu/DishCard.ts: Card component displaying a dish's image, name, description, spice level, price, veg/non-veg badge, and an add-to-cart button.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuTabs.ts: Horizontally scrollable tab bar for filtering menu items by category, with emoji icons and active/inactive styling.
frontend/src/components/offers/Countdown: Countdown timer component that ticks every second and displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until a target date.
frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx: Imperatively manages document head metadata including title, description, Open Graph, Twitter Card tags, canonical link, and JSON-LD structured data via useEffect.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (items, totals) with add, remove, update, and clear actions, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/context/LanguageContext.tsx: React context providing English/Tamil language toggling with a typed translation lookup function covering all UI string keys.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Defines the `Dish` interface, menu category list, and full `menuData` array containing all dishes across categories like Veg Starters, Non-Veg Starters, Biryani, etc., with details like price, spice level, and image URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching reviews, submitting reviews, managing reservations, and subscribing to the newsletter.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines custom utility classes and CSS variables for the restaurant's coal/gold/maroon design theme including animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying the restaurant's story, chef profiles, and hygiene certifications with a hero section, SEO metadata, and styled layout using the site's design system.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Renders the Coal & Curry blog page displaying six static blog posts about Chettinad cuisine, coal-fire cooking, and Tamil food culture, each with category color badges and SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Displays the shopping cart with item list, quantity controls, remove buttons, and a subtotal summary, redirecting to an empty-cart state when no items are present.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Provides a checkout flow with order type selection (delivery/takeaway), delivery address input, payment method choice, and an order confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders the contact page with business hours, contact details (address, phone, email, WhatsApp), social links, and a simple contact form with submission state.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Displays a sectioned photo gallery (charcoal cooking, interiors, food, celebrations) with a lightbox component supporting previous/next navigation between images.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Composes the homepage from hero, signature dishes, reviews, offers, and Instagram feed sections, and injects Restaurant schema.org structured data via SEOHead.
frontend/src/pages/Loyalty.tsx: Renders the Loyalty Program page showing tier levels (Coal to Inferno), program benefits, and a phone-number enrollment form with validation and success state.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: Renders the Menu page with category tabs, filtering dishes from menuData by active category, and displaying them in a responsive grid of DishCards.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: Renders the Offers page displaying six hardcoded time-limited promotional deals (with countdown timers) in a responsive grid with a hero banner.
frontend/src/pages/Reservation.tsx: Renders a table reservation form with validation, submits via useSubmitReservation hook, and shows a confirmation summary screen on success.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines a keyword-to-response map for the chatbot, providing canned multi-variant answers covering menu, hours, reservations, delivery, location, offers, pricing, payment, specials, and loyalty.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom brand colors (coal, maroon, gold, smoky, cream), display fonts, fire/gold box shadows, and custom keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 5) for the Coal & Curry restaurant website, documenting architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and design requirements for a dark-luxury South Indian restaurant site targeting Neyveli, Tamil Nadu.
